description.value: Keyword: [Hindered] Effect: Target gains the Fleeing condition (water is source). If they do not reach air in a number of rounds equal to their Constitution score, they gain the unconscious condition. Recovery: The Fleeing condition ends immediately if the character reaches air. If the target is unconscious, an ally with Medicine 2+ may spend 1 minute administering aid. On success, the drowning target makes a [[/save type=fortitude]] (1 success) to regain consciousness. On failure, they remain unconscious.

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Drowning
